title: Jaun Elia Sad Line 23
content:
Sharam, dehshat, jhijhak, pareshani
Mile naye naye dost toh dosti ki gayi...
meaning: The poet speaks about the awkwardness and hesitation when meeting new friends after a loss or change.

title: Ahmad Faraz Love Line 01
content:
Suna hai log usey aankh bhar ke dekhte hain
So uske shehar mein kuch din thehar ke dekhte hain
meaning: I've heard people gaze at her intently, so I'll stay in her city for a few days to see for myself.
